name: Guangdong Tannery Limited
summary: Guangdong Tannery Limited, an investment holding company, processes and sells semi-finished and finished leather in Mainland China. The company is also involved in leasing plant and machinery; processing cowhides; and trading leather. It serves leather product manufacturers primarily branded shoes manufacturers. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Central, Hong Kong. Guangdong Tannery Limited is a subsidiary of GDH Limited.
